creator: datahead4@gmail.com
text:
The final release candidate for the Digikam 0.10.x branch has been posted (see http://www.digikam.org/drupal/node/425 for info) and the final version is slated for March 2009.

Fix: The attached patch brings the port up to rc2 status and fixes a reference to the proper kipi-plugins-kde4 port in the pkg-descr file.  New version is build-tested in tinderbox on i386 and amd64.

Patch attached with submission follows:
